paper.title: Human-on-the-Bridge: Scalable Evaluation for AI Agents

official_release.paper_link_evidence: The v1 PDF footnote on manuscript page 1 links this repository as ProofAgent Harness.

paper_time_snapshot.selection_rule: Latest repository commit at or before the immutable arXiv v1 submission timestamp, selected through the GitHub commits API with until=2026-06-15T15:47:52Z.
paper_time_snapshot.commit_message: harness: announce_run_start sends FULL run context (role distinct from agent_name)

acquisition_time_snapshot.selection_rule: Default-branch HEAD returned by git ls-remote at acquisition time.
acquisition_time_snapshot.timing_boundary: This snapshot was committed 28 days after arXiv v1 submission and must not be treated as the exact paper-time implementation.

release_inspection.scope: Inspected complete archive member inventories and read the release README, trap manifest specification, a rigorous-juror persona, and an unauthorized-tool-call trap. Counted trap, persona, test, example, and empirical-artifact paths in both snapshots.
release_inspection.exposed_artifacts: Both snapshots expose executable harness source, 183 Markdown trap manifests across 11 families, juror persona prompts, examples, documentation, and tests. The later snapshot contains broader observability and governance code and 6 personas.
release_inspection.paper_result_artifact_search: Neither snapshot contains the paper's domain-by-agent-by-harness run configurations, 470 run-level trials, 23,500 agent turns, evidence-linked evaluation reports, model usage/cost ledgers, per-agent score records, paired calibration records, or metric-level result tables. The only path-name calibration signals are an issue template in both snapshots and benchmarks/calibration_check.py in the pre-v1 snapshot. The later README invokes the HOB paradigm but does not contain the paper's arXiv ID or headline denominators; it links the separate Harness infrastructure paper arXiv:2605.24134.
release_inspection.claim_boundary: The release permits inspection of reusable evaluation machinery and authored trap/persona content, but does not locally reproduce or falsify the HOB paper's reported empirical comparisons or cost claims without the missing exact configurations, transcripts, scores, and accounting records.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable arXiv v1 PDF and extracted layout-preserving full text. Verified the title, sole byline and affiliation, arXiv v1 marker, 33 page boundaries, complete table of contents, experimental/conclusion text, acknowledgments, and references. Archived both the last official repository commit before v1 submission and acquisition-time main, checked archive integrity and inventories, and inspected representative primary implementation artifacts. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review, rerun of the 470 reported trials, validation of expert authority, reproduction of metrics or costs, endorsement of commercial claims, or evidence of professional validity, safety, cross-domain generalization, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: Use the immutable v1 PDF/text as the paper claim source. Use commit 424053ca1749051fe03c67534fc909fe63e1cc83 for the closest verifiable paper-time implementation and commit 95ec9e42b7d1e571493dbe3e691d75fa1eed1187 only as a clearly post-v1 release. Preserve the central release ceiling: code, traps, personas, and tests are inspectable, but the reported 47 completed configurations, 470 runs, 23,500 turns, evidence-linked reports, score tables, exact model/configuration matrix, expert-curation records, and cost ledger are absent from both snapshots. Do not infer their denominators, calibration, uncertainty, expert provenance, or reproducibility from the framework code.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIP archives are ignored local evidence; the extracted full text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from their immutable URLs and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
